title: How to Install Label Studio for Local Development
text: This tutorial introduces how to install Label Studio for local development.

title: How to Install Label Studio for Local Development
text:
About Label Studio



Picture from https://github.com/HumanSignal/label-studio (licensed under the Apache License 2.0 © Heartex)


Label Studio is an open source data labeling tool that supports multiple projects, users, and data types in one platform. It supports labeling data types like audio, text, images, videos, and time series with a simple and straightforward UI and exporting to various model formats. It can be used to prepare raw data or improve existing training data to get more accurate ML models.1
1 https://github.com/HumanSignal/label-studio.

title: How to Install Label Studio for Local Development
text:
Prerequirements
Before starting this tutorial, ensure that the following tools are installed on your local environment.

Python 3.13 Download
Yarn 1.22.22 Download
NodeJS v24.13.1 Download
Git for Windows 2.53.0 Download

title: How to Install Label Studio for Local Development
text:
📥 1. Get the Source
The first step is to download the latest Label Studio from its GitHub repository.
# Clone the repository (use `--depth 1` to accelerate downloading)
git clone https://github.com/HumanSignal/label-studio.git --depth 1

# Switch to the source directory (the root directory)
cd label-studio

title: How to Install Label Studio for Local Development
text:
🐍 2. Set Up Python Environment
# Install poetry (for Python package dependency management)
pip install poetry

# Check poetry installation
poetry env info

# Set up poetry virtual environment
poetry config virtualenvs.in-project true

# Install all Python package dependencies
poetry install

title: How to Install Label Studio for Local Development
text:
🗄️ 3. Create Database
# Run database migrations
poetry run python label_studio/manage.py migrate

# Collect static resources (for the frontend)
poetry run python label_studio/manage.py collectstatic --noinput

title: How to Install Label Studio for Local Development
text:
⚛️ 4. Build Frontend Resources (Important!)
# Switch to the frontend directory
cd web

# Configure yarn with Git Bash (for Windows)
yarn config set script-shell "~/Git/bin/bash.exe"

# Install dependencies
yarn install --frozen-lockfile

# Build frontend resources
yarn build

# Switch to the root directory
cd ..
After the build is complete, the frontend files will be generated in the web/dist/apps/labelstudio directory, which is the path that Django looks for when collecting static files.

title: How to Install Label Studio for Local Development
text:
🔄 5. Collect Static Resources (Again!)
# Collect static resources
poetry run python label_studio/manage.py collectstatic --noinput

title: How to Install Label Studio for Local Development
text:
🚀 6. Start Dev Server
# Run dev server
poetry run python label_studio/manage.py runserver
Now, you can access the Label Studio web interface by visiting http://localhost:8080.

title: Huang Xie, PhD
text:
GitHub
  
  
      LinkedIn
  
  
      ORCID
  
  
      Google Scholar
  

  
  
I’m a postdoctoral researcher in the Multimodality Research Group at the University of Helsinki. I earned my PhD in 2026 from the Audio Research Group at Tampere University, where I also completed my MSc in Data Engineering and Machine Learning in 2020. I hold an MEng in Software Engineering from the University of Science and Technology of China (2014). Prior to my academic career, I spent over seven years in the industry as a full-stack software engineer. I’m passionate about bridging AI research and real-world applications.



🤖 Multimodal Deep Learning
🎬 Audio & Video Understanding
🔍 Self-Supervised Learning, Zero-Shot Learning
💻 Software Development
